messages.text: A garrote bites into your throat, choking off your breath and your voice; you can barely fight through the strangling grip.
A garrote bites into {name}'s throat, and they claw and gasp against the strangling wire.
The garrote slackens and you gulp down air, your voice and your fight returning.
The garrote around {name}'s throat slackens and they gasp in a ragged breath.
{name} is choking against a garrote wire, unable to cry out or fight cleanly.
